title: Detect Application.put_env/3 leakage in an async test
prompt: Given a test module that contains `setup do Application.put_env(:my_app, :feature_x, true); on_exit(fn -> Application.delete_env(:my_app, :feature_x) end) end`, write `docs/app_env_leak.md` explaining: (1) this is NOT safe for `async: true`, (2) `Application.put_env` is global state shared across all processes, (3) another concurrent test reading `:feature_x` will see the unexpected value, (4) fix is to mark `async: false` with a comment OR use `Process.put/2` if the per-process scope is acceptable.
tier_rationale: Requires recognizing an obscure anti-pattern and the two alternative fixes.
